title: condition-gitea-actions plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the condition-gitea-actions semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_BRANCH.description: Optional branch name override. When set, require the Gitea Actions ref branch to match this value.

SEMREL_BRANCH.description: Release branch name for the current semrel execution.

SEMREL_TAG_NAME.description: Release tag name for the current semrel execution.
